_comment: Browser-demo fixture for Step 7 — audio item in cinematic_fullscreen mode triggers the visualizer canvas as the scene layer. Visualizer renders particles + harmonic waves + central orb + pulsing ring against a palette extracted from the cover art (POC-derived). The amplitude provider defaults to silence (Step 9 wires the real AnalyserNode), so the visualizer renders calm — verify particle drift + palette match cover.
name: Demo — Visualizer Cinematic
description: Visualizer canvas + audio in cinematic mode.
